---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

# Plot Rank by Week for Billboard Data

## load tidyverse

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
```

## pivot data longer

## change week column to be by number (numberic only)

```{r}
billboard_long = billboard |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = wk1:wk76, 
    names_to = "week", 
    values_to = "rank",
    values_drop_na = TRUE
  ) |>
  mutate(week = parse_number(week))
#the above reads through all the wk1, wķ2... and arranges numerically

#plot rank by week using long format
ggplot(billboard_long, aes(x = week, y = rank, group = track)) +
  geom_line() +
  #the following line transforms the data to flip x and y i think
  scale_y_reverse() +
  labs(x = "Week", y = "Rank") +
  theme_bw()
```
